news_items.headline: Buxton sparks Twins' fireworks in return after 4-game absence
Dodgers call up C Eliezer Alfonzo Jr., whose sister and stepmother remain missing after Venezuelan earthquakes
news_items.summary: Nearly 3,000 people have been reported dead in the aftermath of the Venezuelan earthquakes.

news_items.headline: Twins jump all over Yankees rookie Brendan Beck in July 4th fiasco
news_items.summary: The hits just kept on coming against Becky and the rest of the Yankee staff.

news_items.headline: Rookie struggles in spot start as Yanks drop July 4 matinee
Yankees pitching woes continue in 11-4 loss to Twins
news_items.summary: The New York Yankees surrendered six homers and never led in an 11-4 loss to the Minnesota Twins on Saturday, July 4. Brenden Beck started for the Yankees on the mound, his MLB debut, but struggled mightily and allowed five earned runs in just 3.2 innings.

news_items.headline: Cincinnati Reds vs. Baltimore Orioles – Hunter Greene vs. Brandon Young
news_items.summary: Cincinnati’s ace returns to face the Baltimore Orioles on the 4th of July.

news_items.headline: Game Discussion: Milwaukee Brewers (54-32) @ Arizona Diamondbacks (43-43)
news_items.summary: Brewers look to lock up the season series against the D-Backs tonight with Big Woo on the mound

news_items.headline: SB Nation Reacts Results: Would you change the draft?
news_items.summary: Welcome to SB Nation Reacts, a survey of fans across the MLB. Throughout the year we ask questions of the most plugged-in Arizona Diamondbacks fans and fans across the country. Sign up here to participate in the weekly emailed surveys. Since I was out of range this week – I will be leaving a one-star […]
